subcodes.first_line: O God, my God! Thou beholdest Thy servants who are sincere towards all humanity
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری ان عبادک المخلصین لجمیع الوری حتی الاعداء و یخدمون کل البشر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @composure; tranquillity; serenity
